title: AI Sales Outreach Agent
description: Built a Python-based outbound sales agent that researches company websites, discovers public contact emails, generates personalized outreach drafts with OpenAI, and sends approved emails through Inkbox with a safe review-inbox workflow by default. Stack: Python, OpenAI API, and Inkbox SDK. Learned how to combine web research, AI-generated personalization, and guarded email delivery into a practical outbound workflow.
